nodes.name: Cohort Config
nodes.notes: Edit per run. One tight category + one locality at a time so the copy stays specific. Places Text Search returns up to 20; run several suburbs to build a ~50 cohort.

nodes.name: Read Prospects Sheet
nodes.notes: Read once. Used by the suppress + dedupe step to never re-contact an existing or opted-out address. This branch terminates here; it is referenced by node name later.

nodes.name: Places: Text Search

httpHeaderAuth.name: Google Places key (header X-Goog-Api-Key) - ATTACH ME

nodes.notes: Create an n8n 'Header Auth' credential: Name = X-Goog-Api-Key, Value = the GOOGLE_PLACES_KEY from clients/valley-arbor/.env. Attach it here. Places returns the website, never the email.

nodes.name: Fetch Website
nodes.notes: Fetch the business's own homepage. continueRegularOutput so a dead or slow site does not stop the run. The published email (if any) is extracted from this HTML in the next step.

nodes.name: Extract Email + Suppress + Dedupe
nodes.notes: The compliance heart of the workflow. GATE 1 no published email = drop. GATE 2 suppressed/unsubscribed/bounced = never contact. GATE 3+4 already in sheet = no double-touch. GATE 5 in-run de-dupe.

nodes.name: Only Fresh Prospects
nodes.notes: Drops the no-op marker so an empty run ends without calling Claude or writing the sheet.

nodes.name: Append to Prospects Sheet
nodes.notes: Appends queued rows. workflow-f's 9am run picks up status 'queued', re-qualifies (the qualifier stays the authority), drafts the opener, and Telegram-gates it.
